label: Gloamshard Quay
description: Gloamshard Quay is a glass-collared landing dock cut into the lip of a fault-limned basin on Lacrymara, its piers paved in fused silicate that holds a permanent electrostatic sheen. Low mooring pylons rise in paired ranks, each capped with mirror-plates tuned to the planet’s auroral girdle and the Vesperglass halo geometry for precision alignment. Breakwaters of vitrified debris form a serrated perimeter that traps drifting glass dust before it reaches the berthing lanes. The copper-white twilight resolves across the quay as long, banded reflections, rendering approach vectors and load zones legible at distance.
